tests.name: maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) uses the built-in default when env is undefined
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) uses the built-in default when env is an empty string
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) uses the built-in default when env is whitespace only
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) uses env list when env contains a valid npub (overrides default entirely)
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) decodes a comma-separated list of valid npubs into hex pubkeys
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) silently drops undecodable entries in a mixed list (fail-soft)
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) falls back to default when env is set but all entries are undecodable
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) trims whitespace around entries before decoding
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) skips empty entries (trailing comma, double comma)
maintainer config — env override (S2 / L33 survivor) exposes the first decoded entry as MAINTAINER_ACTIVE_PUBKEY_HEX
isMaintainerPubkey — multi-maintainer list (S1 / L57 survivor) returns true for the FIRST maintainer in a 2-entry list
isMaintainerPubkey — multi-maintainer list (S1 / L57 survivor) returns true for the SECOND maintainer in a 2-entry list
isMaintainerPubkey — multi-maintainer list (S1 / L57 survivor) returns false for a non-maintainer pubkey even when list has multiple entries
isMaintainerPubkey — multi-maintainer list (S1 / L57 survivor) is case-insensitive for every entry in a multi-maintainer list
maintainer config (S1) exports MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX as a non-empty array
maintainer config (S1) default pubkey decodes to the expected hex
maintainer config (S1) MAINTAINER_ACTIVE_PUBKEY_HEX equals the first element of MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX
maintainer config (S1) MAINTAINER_DISPLAY_NAME is the expected constant
maintainer config (S1) isMaintainerPubkey returns true for a known maintainer hex
maintainer config (S1) isMaintainerPubkey is case-insensitive
maintainer config (S1) isMaintainerPubkey returns false for an unknown pubkey
getNextPublicMaintainerNpubs (S1 publicEnv accessor) returns undefined when the env var is not set
getNextPublicMaintainerNpubs (S1 publicEnv accessor) returns the env var value when set
fireAutoCommit (a) single pubkey → one commit call with Remove proposal + proposeUpdateMetadata
fireAutoCommit (b) empty leafIndexes → commit not called; onCommitted called to drop the stale entry
fireAutoCommit (c) two pubkeys → exactly one commit with two Remove proposals and correct remainingAdmins
fireAutoCommit commit failure → onCommitted not called; entries preserved for next timer cycle
fireAutoCommit burst of N pubkeys (AC-EDGE-3) → single commit absorbs all; pendingQueue is the full snapshot
fireAutoCommit mixed stale + valid → commit contains only valid Remove proposals; stale entries dropped
fetchDecryptedMedia returns cached bytes from mediaPersistence without calling blossomGet
fetchDecryptedMedia on cache miss: downloads, decrypts, caches, and returns bytes (not a URL)
fetchDecryptedMedia cache lookup uses fingerprint (sha256:nonce:version), not bare sha256
fetchDecryptedMedia forged attachment with same sha256 but different nonce does NOT replay cached plaintext
fetchDecryptedMedia dedupes concurrent fetches for the same key into a single download
fetchDecryptedMedia propagates BlossomNotFoundError so caller can map to not-found state
fetchDecryptedMedia propagates decrypt errors so caller can map to decrypt-failed state
fetchDecryptedMedia throws when group is not found
ObjectUrlSlot set() creates an object URL from the given blob and stores it
ObjectUrlSlot set() revokes the previous URL before creating a new one
ObjectUrlSlot revoke() releases the current URL and clears the slot
ObjectUrlSlot revoke() is safe to call when slot is empty
ObjectUrlSlot revoke() is idempotent
isSoleAdmin returns true when the single admin matches the current user (exact case)
isSoleAdmin returns false when two admins exist and current user is one of them
isSoleAdmin returns false when one admin exists but is NOT the current user
isSoleAdmin returns false when adminPubkeys is undefined
isSoleAdmin returns false when adminPubkeys is empty
isSoleAdmin returns false when ownPubkeyHex is null
isSoleAdmin returns false when ownPubkeyHex is undefined
isSoleAdmin returns true with case-insensitive match: UPPER admin vs lower own
isSoleAdmin returns true with case-insensitive match: lower admin vs UPPER own
